name: BeriCore
short: Core balance storage engine for the Beri economy cog.
description: Provides the get_beri, add_beri, transfer_beri, and get_user_stats API used by the Beri cog. Stores balances, daily/lifetime stats, and per-member transaction history in Red's Config. Must be loaded before Beri.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs, Beri balances, daily and lifetime earn/spend stats, and a trimmed transaction history (timestamp, delta, reason, actor) per guild member.
author: UltPanda
install_msg: BeriCore loaded! Make sure to load this BEFORE the Beri cog. Use `[p]bericoreinfo status` to confirm both cogs are connected.
